notes: Captured post driveshaft Phase 2. First-order torque lag (τ ≈ 0.4s for default I/c) on rear-axle drive. Adds ~6% to 0-100 (3.48 → 3.68s), ~9% to DRS 200-300 (6.59 → 7.19s), ~5% drop in low-grip lat-g (oil/wet). Stop distances barely affected. All shifts physically consistent with delayed throttle response.
